ValidationRule.description: To Check Entity is Inactive when Invoice is Created.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, ISNEW(), RecordType.DeveloperName != 'Deferred Sub Invoice', leaseworks__Invoice_Deferred_From__c = Null, leaseworks__Y_hidden_AccEnabled__c, leaseworks__Entity__r.leaseworks__Inactive__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Unable to proceed with transactions: The lease is currently associated with an inactive entity. Please link an active entity to the lease to continue.
